description: Selected controls from the UK Cyber Essentials scheme, covering baseline security requirements.

requirements.title: Boundary firewalls and internet gateways
requirements.description: A firewall shall be configured to protect all devices, particularly those that connect to public or untrusted networks.

requirements.title: Secure configuration of devices
requirements.description: Computers and network devices shall be configured to reduce vulnerabilities and provide only the services required to fulfil their role.

requirements.title: User access control
requirements.description: User accounts and access privileges shall be managed to ensure only authorised individuals access systems and data.

requirements.title: Malware protection
requirements.description: Malware protection shall be implemented and kept up to date across all devices.

requirements.title: Security update management
requirements.description: Software shall be kept up to date with security patches applied within 14 days of release for critical/high-risk vulnerabilities.
